methods.description: Process for measuring and imaging colonies using a micrometer eyepiece and SEM for morphological analysis.

steps.description: Measurements were taken with a micrometer eyepiece under a Zeiss stereomicroscope.
steps.searchable_summary: measure colonies using a micrometer eyepiece under a Zeiss stereomicroscope

steps.description: Colonies were coated with gold/palladium and images were obtained using a SEM.
steps.searchable_summary: coat colonies with gold/palladium and obtain images using SEM
